draft: Work it on paper first, like the exam: circle the entities in the sheet, list what determines what (the functional dependencies), then draw the ERD with crow's-foot cardinality and solid/dashed lines. Transfer your work into the fields below.

fields.label: List the functional dependencies hiding in the enrollments sheet.
fields.help: One per line, as  a -> b  (a composite left side is  a, b -> c). A right side may list several columns: a -> b, c.
fields.placeholder:
student_id -> student_name, student_email
course_id -> course_title, dept_id
...

fields.label: Model the design as an ERD. Create the four entities and the three relationships that resolve the sheet.
fields.help: Model each entity with its PRIMARY KEY attribute(s) only; represent foreign keys through the relationships, not as extra attributes. enrollment is the associative entity with composite key (student_id, course_id).
